/**
 * 漢字高手 - 遊戲引擎
 * 處理資料載入、篩選、題目產生等核心邏輯
 */import DB from'./hanziDatabase.json';// ─── 常數 ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const LEVELS=[{id:1,name:'史萊姆',emoji:'🟢',maxFreq:100,desc:'100 字',color:'#27ae60'},{id:2,name:'食人魔',emoji:'👹',maxFreq:1100,desc:'1,000 字',color:'#e67e22'},{id:3,name:'飛龍',emoji:'🐉',maxFreq:2300,desc:'2,300 字',color:'#2980b9'},{id:4,name:'巫妖',emoji:'💀',maxFreq:3500,desc:'3,500 字',color:'#8e44ad'},{id:5,name:'魔王',emoji:'👑',maxFreq:99999,desc:'全字庫',color:'#c0392b'}];export const TIMERS=[{label:'1 分鐘',value:60,tag:'閃電戰'},{label:'3 分鐘',value:180,tag:'遭遇戰'},{label:'5 分鐘',value:300,tag:'攻城戰'},{label:'15 分鐘',value:900,tag:'持久戰'},{label:'無限',value:0,tag:'自由探索'}];export const ALL_RADICALS=DB.radicals;export const ALL_CHARS=DB.chars;// ─── 常用部首前 20（依該部首下轄字數排序）────────────────────────
const radicalFreq={};ALL_CHARS.forEach(c=>{radicalFreq[c.radical]=(radicalFreq[c.radical]||0)+1;});export const TOP_RADICALS=Object.entries(radicalFreq).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).slice(0,20).map(_ref=>{let[r]=_ref;return r;});// ─── 工具函式 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export function shuffle(arr){const a=[...arr];for(let i=a.length-1;i>0;i--){const j=Math.floor(Math.random()*(i+1));[a[i],a[j]]=[a[j],a[i]];}return a;}export function pickRandom(arr,n){let exclude=arguments.length>2&&arguments[2]!==undefined?arguments[2]:[];const filtered=arr.filter(x=>!exclude.includes(x));return shuffle(filtered).slice(0,n);}// ─── 篩選字庫 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export function filterChars(level,selectedRadicals){var _LEVELS$find;const maxFreq=((_LEVELS$find=LEVELS.find(l=>l.id===level))===null||_LEVELS$find===void 0?void 0:_LEVELS$find.maxFreq)||99999;return ALL_CHARS.filter(c=>c.freq<=maxFreq&&selectedRadicals.has(c.radical));}// ─── 預設選取常用前 20 部首 ──────────────────────────────────────
export function defaultRadicals(){return new Set(TOP_RADICALS);}// ─── 造詞過濾 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Lv1~3: 造詞中每個字都必須在 Lv3 範圍內
// Lv4: 造詞中每個字都必須在 Lv4 範圍內
// Lv5: 不過濾
const lv3CharSet=new Set(ALL_CHARS.filter(c=>c.freq<=2300).map(c=>c.char));const lv4CharSet=new Set(ALL_CHARS.filter(c=>c.freq<=3500).map(c=>c.char));export function filterWords(item,level){const words=item.words||[];if(level>=5)return words;// 魔王不過濾
const charSet=level<=3?lv3CharSet:lv4CharSet;const maxLen=level<=4?4:999;return words.filter(w=>{if(w.length>maxLen||w.length<2)return false;if(!w.includes(item.char))return false;// 檢查每個字是否在允許範圍內
for(const ch of w){if(!charSet.has(ch)&&ch!==item.char)return false;}return true;});}// ─── 產生題目池 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
export function generateQuizPool(filteredChars){let count=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:20;// 去重：同一個字只出現一次
const seen=new Set();const unique=[];for(const c of shuffle(filteredChars)){if(!seen.has(c.char)){seen.add(c.char);unique.push(c);}}return unique.slice(0,count);}// ─── 產生單題 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// mode: 1=看字選音, 2=看音選字, 3=造詞填空, 0=隨機
export function generateQuestion(item,pool,level){let mode=arguments.length>3&&arguments[3]!==undefined?arguments[3]:0;// 多音字避免 Mode 3（造詞填空），因為無法確定詞語使用哪個讀音
const isMultiReading=item.readings&&item.readings.length>1;let actualMode;if(mode!==0){actualMode=mode===3&&isMultiReading?[1,2][Math.floor(Math.random()*2)]:mode;}else{if(isMultiReading){actualMode=[1,2][Math.floor(Math.random()*2)];}else{actualMode=[1,2,3][Math.floor(Math.random()*3)];}}const allChars=ALL_CHARS;if(actualMode===1){var _item$readings;// 看漢字選注音 - 4 個選項
const wrongs=pickRandom(allChars.map(h=>h.zhuyin),3,[item.zhuyin,...(((_item$readings=item.readings)===null||_item$readings===void 0?void 0:_item$readings.map(r=>r.zhuyin))||[])]);return{mode:1,options:shuffle([item.zhuyin,...wrongs]),answer:item.zhuyin,wordBlank:null};}else if(actualMode===2){// 看注音選漢字 - 4 個選項
const wrongs=pickRandom(allChars.map(h=>h.char),3,[item.char]);return{mode:2,options:shuffle([item.char,...wrongs]),answer:item.char,wordBlank:null};}else{// 造詞填空
const validWords=filterWords(item,level);let wordBlank='＿';if(validWords.length>0){const word=validWords[Math.floor(Math.random()*validWords.length)];const idx=word.indexOf(item.char);if(idx>=0){wordBlank=word.substring(0,idx)+'＿'+word.substring(idx+1);}}const wrongs=pickRandom(allChars.map(h=>h.char),3,[item.char]);return{mode:3,options:shuffle([item.char,...wrongs]),answer:item.char,wordBlank};}}// ─── 挑戰模式題庫 ───────────────────────────────────────────────
export function generateChallengePool(count){const seen=new Set();const unique=[];for(const c of shuffle(ALL_CHARS)){if(!seen.has(c.char)){seen.add(c.char);unique.push(c);}}return unique.slice(0,Math.min(count,unique.length));}// ─── Markdown 匯入解析 ──────────────────────────────────────────
export function parseMarkdownImport(text){const lines=text.trim().split('\n');const results=[];for(const line of lines){// 跳過標題列和分隔列
if(line.startsWith('|')&&(line.includes('漢字')||line.includes('---')))continue;const cells=line.split('|').map(c=>c.trim()).filter(Boolean);if(cells.length>=3){const[char,zhuyin,pinyin,words,radical]=cells;if(char&&[...char].length===1&&zhuyin){results.push({char,zhuyin,pinyin:pinyin||'',radical:radical||'自訂',strokes:0,words:words?words.split(/[,，、]/).map(w=>w.trim()).filter(Boolean):[],freq:99999});}}}return results;}
